default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and future initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [13% decrease in traffic last week, potentially due to core update and AI overviews boosting in SERPs](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Focus shifting to optimizing existing content and exploring new content types (e.g., comparison tools, directories)](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Koala tool being used to track intent signals and evaluate content performance beyond just sessions](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)

## Topics

### Performance Update

  - [13% decrease in traffic last week](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Possible causes:](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [Google core update](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
      - [AI overviews pushing down organic results by 10-20%](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [March Madness (US basketball championships) potentially affecting traffic patterns](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [SEMrush hasn't shown significant ranking changes yet](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Team to monitor impact and final results in April](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)

### Content Updates and Strategy

  - [Conversion panels updated for top-performing posts since January](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Technology pillar pages being created using ChatGPT for more control](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Focus on using "we" language and directly addressing the audience](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Importance of internal linking to capability and sales pages](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Need for better organization and tracking of intentional link placement](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)

### Future Content Initiatives

  - [Exploring new content types:](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [Comparison tools](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [Directories (e.g., composable web apps)](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [Enhanced pillar pages (e.g., B2B SaaS websites showcase)](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Shift towards "farming" existing content while developing new strategic content paths](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Potential for creating experiential, ungated assets that encourage return visits](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)

### Analytics and Tools

  - [Using ClickUp for testing content effectiveness (4-6 week evaluation period)](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [HubSpot access granted for deeper data analysis](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Koala tool being utilized to:](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
      - [Set up audiences](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
      - [Track intent signals](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
      - [Evaluate content performance beyond sessions](https://fathom.video/share/6S6s-dgQPWGR--zbjWBQZN7w2jBWsUX2?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
